message:
feat(firecracker): destroy ZFS clone on VM deletion

Add ZFS dataset cleanup in DeleteVM to properly clean up ZFS clones
when VMs are deleted. Uses the same destroyZFSDataset helper as CreateVM
for consistency. The cleanup is performed before removing the VM state
directory.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
